draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"WHOLE ROASTED KOHLRABI WITH CRUSHED CURRANTS AND MUSSELS","description":"For this dish, we slowly roast whole kohlrabi in loads of butter and herbs, turning and basting it for hours. The kohlrabi almost chars on the outside and absorbs all of the flavors of the herbs while its own flavor deepens. The musky flavor of roasted kohlrabi is accented by the distinct flavors of currants, anise hyssop flowers, and mussels, which make for a simple but extraordinary combination.","yield_phrase":"4"},"steps":[]}
